title: Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: Aidan (and Richard) were great tour guides! So much history in that tower! They kept it fun and informative, and there’s a great ending at the bar upstairs. ### Smith Tower Observatory Admission Ticket. ### Seattle City and Snoqualmie Falls Half-Day Guided Tour. The hours on the ticket were incorrect. We look forward to hosting you on site here at the historic Smith Tower. It was worth getting the tour and not just doing it on your own unless you just go for the view. We enjoyed our bar drinks and viewings of the city and mountain ranges. It was a perfect day and we are so happy you joined us. Our staff in the Observatory are so happy to have served you and we are so excited to host you once more here at the historic Smith Tower. We look forward to you visiting again, and including you in our history here at the Smith Tower.

title: Explore Seattle Southside | Hotels, Dining & Things to Do
content: # Welcome to Seattle Southside. It's time to explore, shop, or just relax at the beach - whatever you're into you'll find it all right here. Plan the perfect trip to Seattle Southside. Discover fun things to do, the best hotels to stay, the great variety of food and drink options, and more. Seattle Southside is a fun and unique destination to visit as well as being a convenient and affordable place from which to explore one of the most unique areas in the Pacific Northwest. The results are in for the first-ever Best of Seattle Southside Awards! The Seattle Southside consists of Tukwila, SeaTac and Des Moines, three… Learn More. Attractions When you make Seattle Southside your home base, you’ll be in the center of the action… Learn More. Some of the best things to do in Seattle are in Seattle Southside! Some of the best Seattle attractions are in Seattle Southside, and there are all kinds of things to do near….
